title: Sirio Design System from INPS
content: Sirio from Directories: Components: INPS Design System is a tailored framework for the Istituto Nazionale della Previdenza Sociale in Italy. It combines design standards, principles, and reusable components to create intuitive, accessible, and visually coherent interfaces for INPS's digital platforms. Sirio emphasizes user-centric design and accessibility, ensuring that services are easy to navigate and inclusive for a diverse audience, from young workers to elderly pensioners. Accessibility Color System Elevation Figma Repository Icons Layout Patterns Responsive Spacing Tokens Typography Voice and Tone Accordion Alert banner Breadcrumb Button Cards Checkbox Chip Data table Date picker Dialog Dropdown Navigation bar Page header Pagination Progress bar Radio button Search Slider Switch Tabs Tag Text field Tooltip
